## Registers and states {#registers-and-states}

### Registers and classical state sets {#registers-and-classical-state-sets}
（内容は準備中です）

### Quantum states of registers {#quantum-states-of-registers}
（内容は準備中です）

### Reductions and purifications of quantum states {#reductions-and-purifications-of-quantum-states}
（内容は準備中です）
